obligations.description: Source and successor contexts obey prefix typing.
obligations.reason: Gamma_n advances exactly one prefix step and all symbols are formed no later than their context.

obligations.description: Enumerator is formed in the present prefix and ranges only over present candidates.
obligations.reason: Enum_n and every enumerated candidate are source-context symbols formed at the current prefix.

obligations.description: Diagonal candidate depends only on present enumerator plus the diagonal-productivity rule.
obligations.reason: The diagonal object is formed at n and is outside Enum_n's present range.

obligations.description: Separation proof covers the present enumerator and records the symbolic all-k basis.
obligations.reason: All present enumerator values are checked distinct from Diag(Enum_n), with symbolic basis recorded.

obligations.description: Admissibility witness depends only on the diagonal, Adm_n, and the admissibility rule.
obligations.reason: w_diag proves Adm_n(Diag(Enum_n)) without importing future schema.

obligations.description: Source trace records the issued candidate and witness in the successor context.
obligations.reason: tau_diag links Gamma_n, Enum_n, Diag(Enum_n), w_diag, and Gamma_n_plus_1.

obligations.description: Completed future traces are rejected internally while preserved as an external absorber.
obligations.reason: No context symbol has a forbidden future kind; Omega_future is invalid internally but remains an external absorber.

obligations.description: Positive result is restricted to the local constructive class.
obligations.reason: Finite, computable, and internal fixed-oracle comparators do not pass source issuance.

obligations.description: Effect typing preserves local/formal scope and blocks physical-source overclaim.
obligations.reason: The proof object yields Issue[S]^LC only; physical issuance and claim movement remain false.
